title: The True Story of Puss'N Boots
original_title: La véritable histoire du Chat Botté
overview: Following the death of their miller father, his eldest son inherits the mill, the middle one a donkey, and the youngest a cat. While initially disappointed, the lad soon learns not only that the cat can talk but is quite resourceful.
